01-candidate-registration-gaps.title: Candidate/Maid Registration — Fill Gaps
01-candidate-registration-gaps.notes: Added PlaceOfBirth, LocationType (InsideCountry/OutsideCountry) to Candidate entity. Added CertificateOfCompetency, AttestedMedicalCertificate, PassportCopy, PersonalPhoto to DocumentType enum. Frontend forms updated with new fields, photo/passport marked as required. Location filter added to candidates list. i18n keys added for en/ar. Migration: AddCandidateRegistrationGaps.

02-trial-period-workflow.title: Trial Period Workflow
02-trial-period-workflow.notes: New Trial module created (Trial.Contracts + Trial.Core). Trial entity with 5-day auto-calculated end date, status machine (Active/Successful/Failed/Cancelled), outcome tracking (ProceedToContract/ReturnToInventory). Worker validation via raw SQL (must be InCountry + Available/NewArrival). Events: TrialCreated, TrialCompleted, TrialCancelled. API: CRUD + complete + cancel endpoints. Frontend: list page with DataTableAdvanced, create page, detail page with skeleton loading, complete/cancel dialogs. Sidebar nav added. i18n en/ar. Migration: AddTrialModule.

03-returnee-process.title: Returnee Process
03-returnee-process.notes: New Returnee module (Returnee.Contracts + Returnee.Core). ReturneeCase entity with ReturnType (ReturnToOffice/ReturnToCountry), status workflow (Submitted/UnderReview/Approved/Rejected/Settled), guarantee period tracking, amortization refund formula (ValuePerMonth = TotalAmountPaid/24, RefundAmount = TotalPaid - MonthsWorked*ValuePerMonth). ReturneeExpense entity for tracking costs (visa, ticket, medical, transport, accommodation). Cross-module validation via raw SQL for workers, contracts, clients. Events: ReturneeCaseCreated, ReturneeCaseApproved, ReturneeCaseSettled. API: CRUD + approve/reject/settle + add expense + refund calculation. Permissions: returnees.view/create/manage/settle/delete. Frontend: list page with DataTableAdvanced (filter by status/type), create page, detail page with refund breakdown, expense table, approve/reject/settle/add-expense dialogs, skeleton loading. Sidebar nav, i18n en/ar. Migration: AddReturneeModule.

04-runaway-maid-process.title: Runaway Maid Process
04-runaway-maid-process.notes: New Runaway module (Runaway.Contracts + Runaway.Core). RunawayCase entity with status workflow (Reported/UnderInvestigation/Confirmed/Settled/Closed). On report: worker set to Absconded, contract Terminated via raw SQL. Guarantee period detection from contract's guarantee_end_date. RunawayExpense entity for cost tracking (CommissionRefund/VisaCost/MedicalCost/TransportationCost/Other) with PaidBy party. Supplier liability tracking when within guarantee. Events: RunawayCaseReportedEvent, RunawayCaseConfirmedEvent. Permissions: runaways.view/report/manage/settle/delete. API: CRUD + confirm/settle/close + add expense + status history. BFF enrichment for worker/client names. Frontend: list page with DataTableAdvanced + status filter, report page, detail page with supplier liability banner, expenses table, status history timeline, action dialogs, skeleton loading. Sidebar nav, i18n en/ar. Migration: AddRunawayModule.

05-visa-processing-module.title: Visa Processing Module
05-visa-processing-module.notes: New Visa module (Visa.Contracts + Visa.Core). VisaApplication entity with VisaType (EmploymentVisa/ResidenceVisa/EmiratesId), status workflow (NotStarted/DocumentsCollecting/Applied/UnderProcess/Approved/Rejected/Issued/Expired/Cancelled). VisaApplicationStatusHistory for audit trail. VisaApplicationDocument entity with VisaDocumentType (AttestedMedicalCertificate/PassportCopy/Photo/LocalMedical/MedicalCertificate/Other). Document requirements vary by visa type and worker location (inside/outside country). Sequencing enforced: Employment Visa must be approved before Residence Visa. Duplicate active visa prevention. Auto-generated application codes (VSA-000001). Events: VisaApplicationCreatedEvent, VisaStatusChangedEvent, VisaIssuedEvent. BFF enrichment for worker/client names. Permissions: visas.view/create/manage/delete. Frontend: list page with DataTableAdvanced + status/type filters, create page with document requirements preview, detail page with status timeline + document checklist + transition dialog, skeleton loading. Sidebar nav (Stamp icon), i18n en/ar. Migration: AddVisaModule.

06-arrival-management.title: Arrival Management
06-arrival-management.notes: New Arrival module (Arrival.Contracts + Arrival.Core). Arrival entity with status workflow (Scheduled/InTransit/Arrived/PickedUp/AtAccommodation/NoShow/Cancelled). ArrivalStatusHistory for audit trail. Flight info, driver assignment, photo URLs (pre-travel/arrival/pickup), accommodation confirmation, customer pickup tracking. Auto-code generation (ARR-000001). PlacementStatusChangedConsumer auto-creates arrivals on TicketArranged. NonArrivalCheckJob (Hangfire hourly) detects overdue arrivals and publishes MaidNoShowEvent. BFF enrichment for worker names/photos with IFileStorageService presigned URLs. Permissions: arrivals.view/create/manage/driver_actions/delete. Frontend: list page with DataTableAdvanced + status filter + overdue highlighting, schedule page, detail page with status stepper + info cards + action dialogs + photo gallery + status history timeline, skeleton loading. Sidebar nav (Plane icon), i18n en/ar. Migration: AddPlacementModule (shared).

07-accommodation-module.title: Accommodation Management Module
07-accommodation-module.notes: AccommodationStay entity with CheckedIn/CheckedOut status and DepartureReason enum. Service with check-in/check-out, daily list, current occupants, worker history. Consumers: MaidAtAccommodationConsumer (auto check-in from arrival), PlacementStatusChangedConsumer (auto checkout on deploy), RunawayCaseConfirmedConsumer, ReturneeCaseApprovedConsumer. Frontend: list page with current/all/daily views, detail page with check-out dialog, check-in form. Permissions: accommodations.view, accommodations.manage. Migration: AddAccommodationModule.

08-driver-role.title: Driver Role
08-driver-role.notes: Driver role template added to RoleTemplateSeeder with arrivals.driver_actions permission. Driver-scoped API endpoints: GET /my-pickups (filters by current user's driver ID), PUT /{id}/upload-pickup-photo (with ownership check). SetDriverPickupPhotoAsync added to ArrivalService. Frontend: DriverDashboardPage with mobile-friendly card-based UI, skeleton loading, confirm pickup + camera photo upload (capture=environment for mobile). apiClient.uploadFile method added for multipart form uploads. Route at /driver, sidebar nav entry with Car icon gated by arrivals.driver_actions. i18n en/ar for driver namespace.

09-supplier-portal.title: Supplier Portal
09-supplier-portal.notes: New SupplierPortal module (SupplierPortal.Contracts + SupplierPortal.Core). SupplierUser entity linking platform users to suppliers. Cross-module data isolation via raw SQL: candidates/workers filtered by tenant_supplier_id, commissions by global supplier_id, arrivals via worker join. Dashboard with candidate/worker/commission stats. BFF controller resolves current user to supplier. Permissions: supplier_portal.view/create_candidate/upload_documents/upload_pre_travel_photo/manage. Frontend: dashboard with KPI cards, candidates/workers/commissions/arrivals list pages with DataTableAdvanced. Sidebar nav group with 5 children (Store icon). i18n en/ar. Migration: AddSupplierPortalModule.

10-accommodation-staff-role.title: Accommodation Staff Role
10-accommodation-staff-role.notes: Added 'Accommodation Staff' role template (DisplayOrder 8) in RoleTemplateSeeder with permissions: dashboard.view, accommodations.view, accommodations.manage, arrivals.view. Role is non-system, assignable by admin. Sidebar already filters nav items by permission — accommodation staff users only see Dashboard, Arrivals, and Accommodations. All accommodation pages (list with occupants/daily/history views, detail, check-in, check-out) already exist from Task 07. No new frontend pages needed — permission-based sidebar filtering provides the minimal navigation automatically.

11-finance-enhancements.title: Finance Enhancements
11-finance-enhancements.notes: Refund calculation engine with amortization formula (ValuePerMonth = TotalPaid/ContractMonths, RefundAmount = TotalPaid - MonthsWorked*ValuePerMonth), supports ProRata and RoundDown partial month methods. Supplier commission auto-calculation on deployment via PlacementDeployedCommissionConsumer (Fixed/Percentage/Custom). Guarantee period cost recovery: ReturneeCaseApprovedConsumer auto-generates credit notes and supplier debits (CommissionRefund/TicketCost/VisaCost/TransportCost/MedicalCost) when within guarantee. SupplierDebit entity with status workflow (Outstanding/PartiallyPaid/Settled/Waived/Cancelled). SupplierPayment extended with PaymentType (Regular/Commission/DebitSettlement) and PlacementId. TenantFinancialSettings expanded with CommissionSettings, RefundSettings, GuaranteeSettings, AccommodationDailyRate. API: FinanceCalculationsController (refund preview, commission calculate), SupplierDebitsController (CRUD + status transition). Permissions: supplier_debits.view/create/edit/manage_status/delete. Frontend: SupplierDebitsPage with DataTableAdvanced, status filter, create/transition dialogs, summary cards. FinancialSettingsPage expanded with 4 new sections (commission, refund, guarantee, accommodation). i18n en/ar. Migration: AddFinanceEnhancements.

12-reporting-module.title: Reporting Module Expansion
12-reporting-module.notes: New Reporting module (Reporting.Contracts + Reporting.Core). 10 reports across 3 categories: Workforce (Inventory, Deployed Workers, Returnees, Runaways), Operational (Arrivals, Accommodation Daily, Deployment Pipeline), Finance (Supplier Commissions, Refunds, Cost Per Maid). All reports use raw SQL via SqlQueryRaw<T> for cross-module data access. ReportsController with 10 GET endpoints under reports.view permission. Frontend: ReportsHubPage with category-grouped card grid, 10 individual report pages with DataTableAdvanced, CSV export, date range filters, status filters, skeleton loading. DeploymentPipeline uses bar chart visualization. i18n en/ar. Sidebar nav with FileBarChart icon.

13-maid-status-lifecycle.title: Maid Status Lifecycle Alignment
13-maid-status-lifecycle.notes: Added 4 new WorkerStatus values: VisaProcessing, Traveling, InAccommodation, Returnee. Updated status machine with full lifecycle transitions. WorkerLifecycleTimeline visual component added to detail page. Display names aligned to spec (Arrived, Deployed, Runaway, Returned to Country). No schema migration needed (enums stored as strings). 122 unit tests pass.

14-notifications-expansion.title: Notifications Expansion
14-notifications-expansion.notes: Added Priority (normal/urgent) and EventType fields to Notification entity. Created NotificationTemplate entity (tenant-configurable, bilingual en/ar, per event type). Created UserNotificationPreference entity (per-user mute/channel preferences per event type). Added 18 new MassTransit event consumers covering all business events: maid lifecycle (CandidateStatusChanged), booking/deployment (PlacementCreated, PlacementStatusChanged), arrivals (Scheduled, Confirmed, NoShow [urgent], PickupConfirmed), visa (StatusChanged, Issued), trials (Created, CompletionDue, Completed), returnees (Created, Approved with cost recovery), runaways (Reported [urgent], Confirmed [urgent]), financial (PaymentReceived, RefundProcessed, SupplierCommissionDue, OverduePayment [urgent]). Created FinancialEvents.cs and TrialCompletionDueEvent in SharedKernel. API: NotificationTemplatesController (CRUD with notifications.manage permission), NotificationPreferencesController (GET/PUT for current user). Frontend: updated NotificationItem with urgent visual distinction (red border, Zap icon, 'urgent' badge), NotificationsPage with skeleton loading, NotificationPreferencesPage with category-grouped event toggles and channel selection. Sidebar nav entry added. i18n en/ar for all 23 event types. Migration: AddNotificationExpansion.

15-placement-outside-country-flow.title: Placement — Outside Country Flow
15-placement-outside-country-flow.notes: Aligned placement to 9-step outside-country flow: Booked → ContractCreated → EmploymentVisaProcessing → TicketArranged → Arrived → Deployed → FullPaymentReceived → ResidenceVisaProcessing → EmiratesIdProcessing → Completed. Added 6 new PlacementStatus enum values. Updated PlacementStatusMachine with step enforcement and prerequisite validation. New API endpoints: POST advance-step (validates prereqs and auto-advances), GET checklist (returns 9-step progress). New entity fields: ContractCreatedAt, EmploymentVisaStartedAt, DeployedAt, FullPaymentReceivedAt, ResidenceVisaStartedAt, EmiratesIdStartedAt, visa/arrival cross-module refs. Frontend: visual progress bar with step indicators, deployment checklist sidebar with step status (Pending/InProgress/Completed), linked entity navigation, advance-step button. Board updated to 9-step pipeline columns. Migration: AddOutsideCountryPlacementFlow.

16-placement-inside-country-flow.title: Placement — Inside Country Flow
16-placement-inside-country-flow.notes: Added InsideCountry 8-step pipeline: Booked → InTrial → TrialSuccessful → ContractCreated → StatusChanged → EmploymentVisaProcessing → ResidenceVisaProcessing → EmiratesIdProcessing. Auto flow detection from worker location (raw SQL). Returnee detection from prior completed placements. 3 new PlacementStatus enum values (InTrial, TrialSuccessful, StatusChanged). PlacementFlowType enum (OutsideCountry/InsideCountry). TrialCompletedConsumer for trial outcome handling (succeed → TrialSuccessful, fail → Cancelled). Dual-pipeline state machine, checklist, and step validation. Frontend: flow-aware board with All/Outside/Inside toggle, PlacementCard IC badge, detail page with flow-specific pipeline dates and trial link, step descriptions for both flows. i18n en/ar. Migration: AddInsideCountryPlacementFlow.

17-contract-enhancements.title: Contract Enhancements
17-contract-enhancements.notes: Added GuaranteePeriod enum (SixMonths/OneYear/TwoYears) with auto-calculation of GuaranteeEndDate. Added TrialContract and TwoYearEmployment contract types. Added TerminationReason enum (ReturnToOffice/ReturnToCountry/Runaway/MutualAgreement/ContractExpiry/ClientRequest/WorkerRequest). Added TrialCompletedConsumer for auto-creating 2-year contracts on trial success. Added ReturneeCaseId/RunawayCaseId linkage fields. Frontend: guarantee period selector on create form, guarantee status indicator (active/expired) on detail, termination reason dropdown in transition dialog, replacement contract creation flow, linked case navigation. Migration: AddContractEnhancements.

18-country-payment-packages.title: Country Payment Packages
18-country-payment-packages.notes: CountryPackage entity (TenantScopedEntity) in ReferenceData module with 11 cost components, supplier commission (Fixed/Percentage), default guarantee period (SixMonths/OneYear/TwoYears), effective date ranges, currency. Service with CRUD, GetByCountry, GetDefaultByCountry, one-default-per-country enforcement. API: 7 endpoints under packages.view/create/edit/delete permissions. Frontend: list page with DataTableAdvanced, create page with cost breakdown + auto-calculate, detail page with inline editing + skeleton loading. Sidebar nav (Package icon). i18n en/ar. Migration: AddCountryPackages.

19-sidebar-reorganization.title: Sidebar Navigation Reorganization
19-sidebar-reorganization.notes: Reorganized sidebar into 7 sections: Dashboard (standalone), Recruitment (Suppliers, Candidates), Inventory & Sales (Workers, Clients, Placements, Trials, Contracts), Operations (Arrivals, Driver, Accommodation, Visa Processing, Compliance), Finance (collapsible group with Invoices, Payments, Supplier Debits, Reports, Settings), Cases (Returnees, Runaways), Administration (Team, Country Packages, Reports, Audit, Settings). Section headers are uppercase, small text, muted color — hidden in collapsed mode (replaced by thin dividers). Empty sections auto-hidden when user lacks permissions. Supplier Portal kept as standalone collapsible group. i18n keys added for all 6 section headers in en/ar.

20-fix-sql-injection.title: Fix SQL Injection Vulnerabilities
20-fix-sql-injection.notes: Parameterized OFFSET/LIMIT in all 4 SupplierPortalService list methods (ListCandidates, ListWorkers, ListCommissions, ListArrivals). Parameterized LIMIT/OFFSET in ReportService.ExecutePagedRawAsync. Added ORDER BY whitelist (AllowedOrderByClauses HashSet) in ReportService to validate all orderBy strings before SQL insertion.

21-fix-n-plus-1-supplier-portal.title: Fix N+1 Query in SupplierPortalService
21-fix-n-plus-1-supplier-portal.notes: Replaced N+1 per-item SqlQueryRaw in ListSupplierUsersAsync with a single bulk query using ANY({0}) to fetch all supplier names at once. Added dictionary-based MapToDto overload. List now fires 3 queries (count + data + supplier names) instead of N+1. | Standards validation warnings — review recommended

22-fix-raw-sql-bypassing-tracking.title: Replace ExecuteSqlRaw with EF Core Tracked Updates
22-fix-raw-sql-bypassing-tracking.notes: Removed 2 ExecuteSqlRawAsync UPDATE calls from RunawayService.ReportAsync (worker Absconded + contract Terminated). Created RunawayCaseReportedConsumer in Worker.Core (loads worker via EF, sets Status=Absconded, adds WorkerStatusHistory, triggers audit interceptor). Created RunawayCaseReportedConsumer in Contract.Core (loads contract via EF, sets Status=Terminated with TerminationReason=Runaway, adds ContractStatusHistory, publishes ContractStatusChangedEvent, triggers audit interceptor). Both consumers have idempotency checks. ReturneeService verified — no ExecuteSqlRawAsync UPDATE calls found (only read-only SqlQueryRaw). AuditableEntityInterceptor now correctly fires for worker/contract status changes on runaway report.

25-fix-file-upload-validation.title: Add File Signature Validation for Uploads

26-add-unit-tests.title: Add Unit Test Project and Critical Tests

30-add-search-indexes-and-rate-limiting.title: Add Search Indexes and Rate Limiting
